gp3sequences 0.1.0
  • Changelog

gp3sequences: Transparent Analysis of Ordered Categorical Sequences

Source: R/gp3sequences-package.R
gp3sequences-package.Rd

gp3sequences provides transparent, reproducible, and auditable tools for working with ordered categorical sequences represented in ordinary long-format data frames.

Details

The package is designed around explicit column mappings, deterministic ordering, documented preprocessing policies, machine-readable diagnostics, and conservative structural summaries. It is not restricted to eye-tracking data or to any particular device or export format.

Interpretation boundary

Sequence outputs describe behavioural or structural patterns. They do not independently establish emotion, cognition, comprehension, personality, intention, diagnosis, deception, or other psychological attributes. Substantive interpretation requires an appropriate study design and external evidence.

See also
